title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
